name: Double Apricot Almond Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the bread pan according to your manufacturer's instructions, reserving one teaspoon of apricot baby food.
2. Bake on a regular bread cycle.
3. Add nuts and apricots when the machine beeps for additions, about 5-10 minutes before the last kneading stage.
4. Cool, then drizzle with glaze below.
Glaze:
1. Mix 1/2 cup powdered sugar, a dash of nutmeg, 1 teaspoon of reserved apricot baby food, and 1 teaspoon of milk.
2. Drizzle over the cooled loaf.
